title: dryopteris patula
intro: Dryopteris patula, also known as the crested leather fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Dryopteris patula include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Dryopteris patula can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as eczema, acne, and wounds.
